conjecture_title: Open question on Schnyder woods for general half-plane triangulations
summary: The paper arXiv:2511.07601 proves existence and uniqueness of the maximal Schnyder wood for infinite triangulations with finite boundary and for the UIHPT, but leaves open whether Schnyder woods exist for all half-plane triangulations (infinite boundary). Uniqueness is established conditionally: whenever a maximal Schnyder wood of the half-plane exists it is unique. A wide web search covering arXiv, Semantic Scholar, and author publication lists found no follow-up paper addressing this open question in the six months since the paper appeared.
search_queries: Schnyder woods half-plane triangulations infinite boundary existence 2025 2026
Addario-Berry Hogan Michel Scott "Schnyder woods" half-plane triangulations arXiv 2511.07601
arXiv search: Schnyder woods half-plane triangulation
notes: No follow-up found. The conjecture is very recent (November 2025); absence of evidence of resolution is expected and reported with high confidence. The key distinction is between triangulations with finite boundary (handled in the paper) and true half-plane triangulations with infinite boundary (open).
